name: Cherry Tomatoes Filled with Salmon Mousse
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the mousse: Combine cream cheese, smoked salmon, lemon juice, and heavy cream in a bowl. Blend until smooth. Refrigerate for 30 minutes.
2. Wash and dry the tomatoes. Cut off the tops of the tomatoes, removing the seeds and pulp. Keep refrigerated until almost time to serve.
3. Place the tomatoes upside down on a tray to drain.
4. To serve, gently soften the salmon mousse with a wooden spoon and fill the tomatoes.
5. Garnish with fresh dill. Place the tomatoes on a bed of green leaves (lettuce or other greens).
